texto: I like it here. I like the girls, and I like the DJ's, and the cocktail waitresses, and the loud rock'n'roll (though I would happily beat everyone in Poison to death with the severed limbs of the members of Warrant).
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Craig Machen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I like it here. I like the girls, and I like the DJ's, and the cocktail waitresses, and the loud …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, memoir, total-fangirl pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e total-fangirl.
